issues.sample: The baffle in the turbo inlet came loose casing the baffle to launch into the turbo chopping it up and shooting it into the engine. This is a common occurrence known by the dealer and manufacturer and could lead to engine failure and fire if the parts reach and melt into the cata

narrative.headline: What 2018 Mclaren 720s owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Unknown Or Other (100% of reports).

issues.sample: The baffle in the turbo inlet came loose casing the baffle to launch into the turbo chopping it up and shooting it into the engine. This is a common occurrence known by the dealer and manufacturer and could lead to engine failure and fire if the parts reach and melt into the cata
issues.title: Unknown Or Other
